allow:
Bash(git commit -m "docs(08-01): complete Analytics Foundation plan

- Created SUMMARY.md documenting task completion
- Updated STATE.md with Phase 08 progress (20% complete)
- Marked plan 08-01 as complete in ROADMAP.md
- Added performance metrics and decisions to STATE.md")

Bash(git commit -m "feat(08-02): create ClassAnalyticsCard component with color-coded health indicators

- Created client component with analytics card display
- Integrated shadcn/ui Card and Badge components
- Applied conditional border-l-4 styling based on health status
- MetricDisplay helper component for consistent metric rendering
- Empty state handling for classes with no sessions
- Responsive touch-friendly design
")

Bash(git commit -m "feat(08-02): enhance lecturer dashboard with analytics cards

- Replaced basic class cards with ClassAnalyticsCard components
- Integrated getAllClassesAnalytics for data fetching
- Display color-coded health indicators per class
- Show metrics: avg attendance, total sessions, enrolled students, at-risk count
- Maintained existing header, empty state, and grid layout
- Cards clickable for drill-down to class detail page
")
